roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
PROB TRANSFER TO SANTA CLARA CO SENT
/CAL: APD PC 1203,9 TRANSFER (TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY)/DAWT/MO GRTD/CTORD:PROBATION TRANSFER FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY/X: ORDER SIGNED AND FILED,/

/X WETRECKLESS/TWS/CH4 CJSS 1 Y PROB 4 Y PJ1D/CTS 1/PF460 12/VF2 150/DDP2/X:COMPLETE 18 MONTH PROGRAM TREATMENT PROGRAM/DEF:IS ALLOWED TO DO THE 18MONTH PROGRAM IN SANTA CLARA COUNTY/LVAL/LCHEM/PROBREVFN/PC/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/CITE/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BYREFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/X:REPORT TO ADULT PROBATION DEPT,/

/CAL DISPOSITION/AMEND TO ADD COUNT 4 - WET RECKLESS 23103VC,MISD PER 2313,5 VC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 4/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/DEF:ADMITTED PRIOR CONVICTION OF 23152(A)VC,MISD IN ALAMEDA COUNTY ON 02-14-07
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/NP/X:REBECCA FERGUESON, APPEARED SPECIALLY,/X:FIRST AMENDED MISDEMEANOR COMPLAINT IS FILED,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DAWF/
/CAL PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/TEXT TRANS TO DEPT 28/TRANS 28 FORTHWITH FOR DISPOSITION/
